episodes.title: Korean Podcast Ep 112.How Cults Changed Koreans | 사이비가 한국을 어떻게 바꿨는가
episodes.description:
Hi! In this episode of the JJUNA OPPA Korean podcast, we’re going to talk about How Cults Changed Koreans!
